parameters-en.Gain: Even at 0.0, Gain is buzzy, fuzzy, and nasty. Higher values provide longer sustain.
parameters-en.Tone: Controls the tone or timbre of the fuzz.
parameters-en.Level: Controls the overall output of the fuzz.
parameters-en.Clipping: Selects the clipping type--Soft or Hard.
parameters-en.Osc Level: Controls the level of the triggered oscillator.
parameters-en.Osc Tone: Controls the tonal balance of the triggered oscillator. Higher values provide more harmonics.
parameters-en.Min Freq: Sets the minimum frequency of the oscillator.
parameters-en.Max Freq: Sets the maximum frequency of the oscillator.
parameters-en.WavShape: Selects the wave shape of the triggered oscillator.
parameters-en.Sensitivity: Controls the oscillator's filter envelope. Higher values drives the oscillator into higher frequencies.
